mission: Keep Buddy useful on the owner laptop without freezing, leaking secrets, spending money, damaging files, or taking live account actions without approval.

recommended_local_storage: GitHub Actions secrets for CI only
buddy_can_do: verify that code reads secrets from environment variables
buddy_cannot_do_without_owner_approval: store raw secrets in generated files

damage_prevention: Prefer dry runs and report generation before live action.
Stop background mode when disk, load, or battery safety checks fail.
Keep generated logs out of git.
Redact token-like values from command output before writing reports.
Require owner approval for any external account, money, credential, deploy, signup, outreach, social, legal, medical, credit, employment, tenant, or identity action.
